content: Use short present simple sentences: My name is..., I am from..., I live in....
For regular verbs, use -ed in simple past. Keep time markers clear (yesterday, last week).
exercise: Write 6 sentences about yesterday using simple past.

content: Use connectors such as and, but, because, then, after that to combine short ideas.
exercise: Combine 8 short ideas into 4 connected sentences.

content: Use opinion frames: I think..., In my view..., The reason is.... Add one example.
exercise: Give your opinion on one topic in 6-8 lines.

content: Build arguments with claim, support, and contrast while keeping cohesive flow.
exercise: Write a short argument with one counterpoint and conclusion.
